description: Reconciliation report extending the prior 2026-03-29T00:00:00Z reconciliation with native vs attached-reference classification for all broad-only repos. Preserves prior overlap/broad-only/active-only history and adds expansion group assignments.

reconciliation.relationship_explanation: The active 14-repo topology is now being expanded to include eligible native Construction OS repos from the broad-only set. Upstream/governance/external repos are preserved as attached references only.

overlap_set.description: Repos present in BOTH the 2026-03-22 broad audit AND the 2026-03-29 active induction

active_only_set.description: Repos in active induction but not in 2026-03-22 broad audit primary list

group_a_active_base.description: Already induced in active canonical topology. Preserved as-is.

group_b_native_candidates.description: Native Construction OS repos from broad-only set eligible for active induction into canonical topology.

repos.evidence: Purified spatial context layer documented in 2026-03-22 system map and platform_inventory.json. Consumed by Runtime, Application_OS, ALEXANDER.
Domain sub-kernel under Construction_Kernel family. Documented in 2026-03-22 system map as CHEMISTRY_KERNEL. HARDENED (pass 2).
Domain sub-kernel for scope boundary truth. Documented in 2026-03-22 system map. HARDENED.
Domain sub-kernel for material truth. Documented in 2026-03-22 system map. HARDENED.
Domain sub-kernel for specification truth. Documented in 2026-03-22 system map. HARDENED.
Ring 2 pattern intelligence engine. Registered in platform_inventory.json with consumer contracts and cognitive bus integration. Documented in 2026-03-22 system map.
Shop drawing compilation capability. Documented in 2026-03-22 system map capabilities layer.

group_c_attached_references.description: Upstream governance, ValidKernel infrastructure, and external execution platforms. Preserved as attached references only — not flattened into native active topology.

repos.reason: Upstream root doctrine. Reference-only for Construction OS.
ValidKernel spatial primitives provider. Upstream dependency.
ValidKernel structural patterns. Upstream lineage parent of Construction_Pattern_Language_OS.
External execution platform for contractor operations. v2 approved.
External execution platform for building-envelope delivery. v2 approved.

broad_only_set_after_expansion.description: After this expansion pass, ALL 11 broad-only repos will be registered — 7 as ACTIVE_NATIVE induced nodes, 4 as ATTACHED_REFERENCE nodes. Plus 4 additional Group C repos (ValidKernelOS_VKBUS, ValidKernel_Registry, trade_os, SUPA-SAINT) not in the original broad audit primary list but documented in infrastructure/platforms sections. Zero broad-only repos will remain unregistered.

reconciliation_guidance: Group B native repos are now eligible for active topology induction with deterministic nodes and edges.
Group C attached-reference repos receive topology nodes with scope=ATTACHED_REFERENCE to distinguish them from native active nodes.
All prior historical audit records are preserved unchanged.
The 2026-03-22 system map remains the broadest architecture reference.
